title: selaginella magnafornensis
intro: Selaginella magnafornensis, also known as the "Resurrection Fern," is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and even showing potential in cancer treatment. Selaginella magnafornensis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in traditional remedies in the form of poultices and tinctures.
